settings.title: Amber Oud
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 01 — DEEP MYSTERY
settings.text: A rich, woody blend of golden amber and smoky oud, balanced with subtle floral notes for a truly sophisticated car atmosphere.

settings.title: Wild Lavender
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 02 — CALMING BREEZE
settings.text: Escape the stress of the road with the soothing scent of French lavender fields, blended with fresh eucalyptus and mint.

settings.title: Sandalwood Silk
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 03 — SMOOTH ELEGANCE
settings.text: Warm sandalwood meets creamy vanilla and white musk, creating a luxurious and welcoming environment for every drive.

settings.title: Ocean Drift
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 04 — COASTAL FREEDOM
settings.text: Bracing sea salt and ozone notes combined with sun-drenched driftwood and a hint of citrus for a refreshing, open-road feeling.

settings.title: Midnight Rose
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 05 — NOCTURNAL BLOOM
settings.text: A modern take on a classic floral, featuring dark rose petals, patchouli, and black pepper for a bold and alluring scent profile.

settings.title: Citrus Grove
settings.subtitle: FRAGRANCE NO. 06 — ENERGIZING ZEST
settings.text: Revitalize your senses with a zesty explosion of grapefruit, lime, and bergamot, perfect for long commutes and early morning drives.
